assertions.name: handles_empty_gracefully
assertions.text: Claude doesn't crash or give up on a nearly empty project — still proceeds with interview

assertions.name: short_known_list
assertions.text: KNOWN list is appropriately short (1-2 items), reflecting the sparse codebase

assertions.name: no_false_assumptions
assertions.text: Claude does not assume a framework, test runner, or architecture that isn't present

assertions.name: starts_with_product
assertions.text: First question is about what the user is building

assertions.name: question_has_options
assertions.text: Questions include concrete options and a recommendation
